data.scene: User triggers a file upload from the dashboard WebView (e.g., attaching a photo, document, or any file to a Home Assistant form).
data.purpose: Allow the user to select any file from device storage for upload to the Home Assistant server via the frontend.
data.source: Device storage (via Android system file picker, type */*)
data.item: User-selected file URI (content:// URI pointing to any file: photos, documents, downloads, etc.)
data.frequency: On-demand (each time the user taps a file upload input in the WebView)
data.processing: Local only; file URI is passed to the WebView JavaScript context. Actual upload is performed by the frontend to the user's Home Assistant server.
data.storage: Not stored on device by the app; the system file picker may grant temporary URI access
data.recipient: Home Assistant frontend WebView (JavaScript context), which uploads the file content to the user's Home Assistant server
data.thirdparty: No third-party involvement; file selection uses the Android system file picker, and uploads go to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server
data.switchpath: N/A (file upload is triggered per-action from the dashboard WebView; no global toggle)
